items.title_en: Kyiv attacked after Ukraine’s Zelenskyy warns of ‘massive Russian strike’ - Al Jazeera
items.title_zh: 乌克兰总统泽伦斯基警告“俄罗斯大规模袭击”后基辅遭到袭击 - 半岛电视台
items.desc_en: Kyiv attacked after Ukraine’s Zelenskyy warns of ‘massive Russian strike’  Al JazeeraRussia launches massive strike on Ukraine as Poland scrambles jets, Finland restricts airspace  CNBCUkraine: Strong
items.desc_zh: 乌克兰泽伦斯基警告“俄罗斯大规模袭击”后，基辅遭到袭击 半岛电视台俄罗斯对乌克兰发动大规模袭击，波兰紧急起飞飞机，芬兰限制领空 CNBC乌克兰：强

items.title_en: Russia launches massive strike on Ukraine as Poland scrambles jets, Finland restricts airspace
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯对乌克兰发动大规模打击，波兰紧急起飞飞机，芬兰限制领空
items.desc_en: The Russian defence ministry said that it launched a "massive strike using long-range precision air, land, and sea-based weapons and attack drones."
items.desc_zh: 俄罗斯国防部表示，它“使用远程精确空基、陆基和海基武器以及攻击无人机发动了大规模打击”。

items.title_en: OpenAI proposes 5% stake to Trump administration to ease Washington pressure: report
items.title_zh: OpenAI 提议向特朗普政府持有 5% 股份，以缓解华盛顿压力：报告
items.desc_en: Trump said in June that the U.S. taking an ownership stake in AI giants would be "a beautiful thing" and make American public "partners in this revolution."
items.desc_zh: 特朗普六月表示，美国持有人工智能巨头的股权将是“一件美好的事情”，并使美国公众成为“这场革命的合作伙伴”。

items.title_en: Volkswagen braces for boardroom showdown over historic cost-cutting plan
items.title_zh: 大众汽车准备就历史性的成本削减计划进行董事会摊牌
items.desc_en: Volkswagen is poised for a boardroom showdown following reports that the auto giant is weighing up shutting four factories and implementing 100,000 job cuts.
items.desc_zh: 有报道称，大众汽车正在考虑关闭四家工厂并裁员 10 万人，该公司准备在董事会摊牌。

items.title_en: Amazon is designing its own AI chips for Echo, Fire TV and future devices, exec tells CNBC
items.title_zh: 亚马逊高管告诉 CNBC，亚马逊正在为 Echo、Fire TV 和未来设备设计自己的人工智能芯片
items.desc_en: Amazon hardware chief Panos Panay says the company is designing custom chips for key devices as it experiments with AI gadgets.
items.desc_zh: 亚马逊硬件主管帕诺斯·帕奈 (Panos Panay) 表示，该公司正在为关键设备设计定制芯片，同时试验人工智能设备。

items.title_en: At least 10 killed in large-scale Russian missile and drone strikes on Kyiv
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯大规模导弹和无人机袭击基辅 至少10人死亡
items.desc_en: Russia launched its biggest strikes on the city in weeks with children among the "significant number" of casualties, Ukrainian officials say.
items.desc_zh: 乌克兰官员表示，俄罗斯对该市发动了几周来最大规模的袭击，伤亡人数“相当多”是儿童。

items.title_en: People smuggler convicted in France now seeking asylum in UK, BBC discovers
items.title_zh: BBC发现，在法国被定罪的人口走私犯目前在英国寻求庇护
items.desc_en: Once described as "the godfather" of French migrant camps, he has been working in a Leicestershire village.
items.desc_zh: 他曾被称为法国移民营的“教父”，一直在莱斯特郡的一个村庄工作。

items.title_en: 'Two weeks after her death I got a call': Gaza patients face agonising delays for evacuation
items.title_zh: “她去世两周后我接到电话”：加沙患者面临疏散延误的痛苦
items.desc_en: An estimated 300 Palestinians referred for treatment abroad have died since the ceasefire began, according to Gaza's Hamas-run health ministry.
items.desc_zh: 据加沙哈马斯卫生部称，自停火开始以来，估计有 300 名被转介到国外接受治疗的巴勒斯坦人死亡。

items.title_en: Shares of BYD and Xiaomi surge as June delivery figures fuel optimism
items.title_zh: 6月交付数据乐观，比亚迪和小米股价飙升
items.desc_en: Hong Kong-listed shares of Chinese electric vehicle makers surged, after companies posted June vehicle data that helped to buoy investor sentiment.
items.desc_zh: 在公司发布 6 月份汽车数据有助于提振投资者情绪后，中国电动汽车制造商在香港上市的股票大幅上涨。

items.title_en: The dollar looks ready to break higher. Here's why Wall Street is turning bullish
items.title_zh: 美元看起来准备突破走高。这就是华尔街变得看涨的原因
items.desc_en: The U.S. dollar may be emerging from nearly a year of stagnation, with analysts increasingly arguing that the world's reserve currency is poised for a more sustained advance.
items.desc_zh: 美元可能正在摆脱近一年的停滞，分析师越来越多地认为，世界储备货币有望实现更持续的上涨。

items.title_en: Europe wants to rebalance trade with Beijing, but can't quit Chinese air conditioners
items.title_zh: 欧洲希望与北京实现贸易再平衡，但无法戒掉中国空调

items.desc_zh: 历史性的热浪推动了欧洲对中国制造空调的前所未有的需求，凸显了布鲁塞尔在与北京贸易再平衡方面面临的艰巨任务。

items.title_zh: 叙利亚总统任命最后70名议员加入阿萨德后新议会
items.desc_en: Fifteen women are appointed, after only six female candidates were selected by regional electoral colleges last October.
items.desc_zh: 去年 10 月，地区选举团只选出了 6 名女性候选人，之后任命了 15 名女性。

items.title_en: Controversial bishops ordained as Pope warns of 'schism' in Catholic Church
items.title_zh: 教皇警告天主教会“分裂”，任命备受争议的主教
items.desc_en: Thousands of worshippers attended a ceremony in the Swiss Alps as part of the breakaway Society of Saint Pius X.
items.desc_zh: 作为脱离圣庇护十世协会的一部分，数千名信徒参加了在瑞士阿尔卑斯山举行的仪式。

items.title_en: Wonka Netflix show faces backlash for AI-generated Gene Wilder voice
items.title_zh: Netflix 节目《旺卡》因人工智能生成吉恩·怀尔德声音而遭到强烈反对
items.desc_en: The actor, who died in 2016, appears in the Netflix show with the consent of his estate.
items.desc_zh: 这位于 2016 年去世的演员在得到其遗产管理人的同意后出现在 Netflix 节目中。

items.title_en: PlayStation will stop releasing games on discs in 2028
items.title_zh: PlayStation 将于 2028 年停止发行光盘游戏
items.desc_en: The firm said future games would still be sold in shops, but they would come with a digital code only.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，未来的游戏仍将在商店出售，但它们只会附带数字代码。

items.title_en: Fed Chief Kevin Warsh set to give view on rates, central bank overhaul at ECB forum: Live updates
items.title_zh: 美联储主席凯文·沃什将在欧洲央行论坛上就利率和央行改革发表看法：实时更新
items.desc_en: The Fed chairman joins a panel of other central bank leaders Wednesday at the ECB Forum on Central Banking in Sintra, Portugal.
items.desc_zh: 周三，美联储主席与其他央行领导人一起出席在葡萄牙辛特拉举行的欧洲央行中央银行论坛。

items.title_en: Three die in Mexico City World Cup celebrations
items.title_zh: 三人在墨西哥城世界杯庆祝活动中死亡
items.desc_en: More than one million people took to the streets of Mexico City on Tuesday to mark the country's win over Ecuador.
items.desc_zh: 周二，超过一百万人走上墨西哥城街头，庆祝该国战胜厄瓜多尔。

items.title_en: Lamborghini reveals new Urus performance hybrid SUV after ditching EVs
items.title_zh: 兰博基尼放弃电动汽车后推出新款 Urus 高性能混合动力 SUV
items.desc_en: Lamborghini is calling the new Urus SE Performante the "fastest Super SUV in the world."
items.desc_zh: 兰博基尼将新款 Urus SE Performante 称为“世界上最快的超级 SUV”。

items.title_en: Why is crucial tech vulnerable to the heat?
items.title_zh: 为什么关键技术容易受到高温影响？
items.desc_en: Energy grids and train services are among the vital services that are vulnerable to very hot weather.
items.desc_zh: 能源网和火车服务是容易受到酷热天气影响的重要服务。

items.title_en: E-scooters being advertised for commuting despite UK road ban
items.title_zh: 尽管英国道路禁令，电动滑板车仍在做通勤广告
items.desc_en: A Press Association investigation found major retailers advertising e-scooters for "commuting" and "urban riding".
items.desc_zh: 新闻协会的一项调查发现，主要零售商为“通勤”和“城市骑行”的电动滑板车做广告。

items.title_zh: WhatsApp 让人们无需交换电话号码即可聊天
items.desc_en: The app's new usernames feature will be rolled out globally over the next few months.
items.desc_zh: 该应用程序的新用户名功能将在未来几个月内在全球推出。

items.title_en: Ford rehires human engineers after AI fails to match quality checks
items.title_zh: 人工智能未能匹配质量检查后，福特重新雇用人类工程师
items.desc_en: The car-maker found AI quality checks failed to match the skill of veteran technicians.
items.desc_zh: 该汽车制造商发现人工智能质量检查无法与经验丰富的技术人员的技能相匹配。

items.title_en: Tech firms are blaming AI for mega device and console price rises
items.title_zh: 科技公司将大型设备和游戏机价格上涨归咎于人工智能
items.desc_en: Xbox consoles, Nintendo's new Switch 2 and Valve's Steam Deck are just some of the gadgets seeing price hikes in recent months.
items.desc_zh: Xbox 游戏机、任天堂的新 Switch 2 和 Valve 的 Steam Deck 只是近几个月价格上涨的一些小玩意。

items.title_en: Why GTA 6 will launch without a disc - and what it means for gamers
items.title_zh: 为什么《GTA 6》将在没有光盘的情况下启动 - 这对游戏玩家意味着什么
items.desc_en: Music and films are now largely digital-only - does the lack of a disc for GTA 6 mean gaming is going the same way?
items.desc_zh: 音乐和电影现在基本上都是数字化的——《GTA 6》缺少光盘是否意味着游戏也会走同样的路？

items.title_en: Teens who hacked TfL were known to police years before cyber-attack
items.title_zh: 警方在网络攻击发生前几年就知道黑客入侵伦敦交通局的青少年
items.desc_en: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.
items.desc_zh: 欧文·弗劳尔斯（Owen Flowers）和塔哈·朱贝尔（Thalha Jubair）因参与袭击而被定罪，这给伦敦交通局带来了巨额损失。

items.desc_zh: 初创企业正在采取新的地热能方法，但经济有效吗？

items.title_en: Apple hikes MacBook and iPad prices, blaming rising chip costs
items.title_zh: 苹果提高MacBook和iPad价格，归咎于芯片成本上涨
items.desc_en: Apple said it had "never seen a component price increase this much, this quickly".
items.desc_zh: 苹果表示，“从未见过零部件价格上涨如此之快”。

items.title_en: IBM hails new 'block of flats' design breakthrough for ultra tiny chips
items.title_zh: IBM 欢呼超微型芯片的新“公寓”设计突破
items.desc_en: IBM says it has created the world's first known chip tech below 1 nanometre - but it will be some time before it's ready for production.
items.desc_zh: IBM 表示，它已经创造了世界上第一个已知的 1 纳米以下的芯片技术，但距离投入生产还需要一段时间。
